platform.name: Platinum
platform.notes: Platform-owned shell, release lanes, docs, replay, services, and host contract.

development.notes: Hosted /dev uses a fourth visible segment to count accumulated post-production integration increments while package.json remains SemVer.

latestReleaseNote.title: Production conformance refresh
latestReleaseNote.summary: Refreshed the live 1.3.0 public family from the accepted 1.3.0.1 hosted-dev bundle, carrying current conformance dashboards, provenance-backed public documentation, resource-economics reporting, application artifact scoring, runtime sprite-capture scoring, and a measured calibrated ship-loss audio cue improvement into hosted `/beta` and hosted `/production`.
